message:
feat(fp-frame): add pd.to_timedelta() and timedelta_total_seconds() (frankenpandas-907)

Add timedelta parsing and conversion functions:

to_timedelta(series): parses duration representations
- "HH:MM:SS" format
- "X days HH:MM:SS" pandas-style timedelta strings
- "X days" day-only
- Natural language: "3 hours", "30 minutes", "45 seconds"
- Int64/Float64: interpreted as total seconds
- Output: normalized "X days HH:MM:SS" or "HH:MM:SS" Utf8 strings

timedelta_total_seconds(series): converts timedelta strings to Float64
total seconds, inverse of to_timedelta for numeric extraction.

9 new tests covering HH:MM:SS, days+HH:MM:SS, days-only, natural
language, integer seconds, large durations, null handling, and
total_seconds round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
